_comment: Project precision/recall bars for `make precision`. Totals precision is intentionally not gated: the full default registry emits unlabelled findings over the corpus (e.g. missing-license on LICENSE-less fixtures), so only totals RECALL (every labelled defect must be found) and per-analyzer precision+recall for the fully-labelled deterministic analyzers are meaningful bars. The gate is capability-aware: an analyzer whose optional tool is absent is not scored.
